# PR #10: stale 0.3.0 Release Please proposal

- **Intent:** automated next-version proposal created before the corrected
  `v0.2.0` tag existed.
- **Problem:** its changelog repeats already released 0.2.0 history and contains
  automatic ISSUE #5 closure references. It is not a valid 0.3.0 change set.
- **Automation:** the Release Please run after validation-record PR #11 merged
  completed successfully but did not refresh this stale branch because the
  docs-only merge introduced no new releasable commit.
- **Status:** closed unmerged on 2026-07-21 after explicit approval.
- **Confidence:** high.
